_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Provide enterprise cybersecurity and supply chain risk management guidance for development of the Continuity of Operations Plans.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of enterprise risk management integration, including how data risk, AI risk, model risk, and technology risk roll up into the enterprise risk taxonomy and board-level risk reporting.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI RM domain. RM-K-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-K-002 (DG, cosine: 0.552), SP-T-010 (SP, cosine: 0.504).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.4/10 (raw 0.443). Shared vocabulary: [enterprise, management, risk]. DCWF-only terms [chain, continuity, cybersecurity, development, guidance, operations] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, board, data, integration, knowledge, level] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.880 (P=0.877, R=0.882). Balanced P/R — the 17-word DCWF element and 28-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Provide enterprise cybersecurity and supply chain risk management guidance for d" and "Knowledge of enterprise risk management integration, including how data risk, AI" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.574 > STS 0.443 (gap +0.131). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [enterprise, management, risk] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 19.4%. Shared tokens: [enterprise, management, risk]. DCWF-only: [chain, continuity, cybersecurity, development, guidance, operations]. WIDAI-only: [ai, board, data, integration, knowledge, level].

signals.detail: STS 0.443 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.131 suggests some vocabulary-driven inflation in candidate selection.
